## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] PR targets `develop` unless this is a release PR from `develop` to `main`
- [ ] local `check-pr` + `review-loop`

## Lightweight check

- [ ] no default-path Workspace/Jarvis/memory/connectors/skills weight
- [ ] no new runtime dependency, or dependency justification is included
- [ ] no secrets in logs, docs, tests, handoffs, or screenshots
